      ISBLANK(FactLinear[days_to_close]), BLANK(),
      FactLinear[days_to_close] = 1,  "Same day",
      FactLinear[days_to_close] <= 7,  "2–7 days",
      FactLinear[days_to_close] <= 14, "8–14 days",
      FactLinear[days_to_close] <= 30, "15–30 days",
      FactLinear[days_to_close] <= 90, "31–90 days",
      "+90 days"
  )

      ISBLANK(FactLinear[days_to_close]), 99,
      FactLinear[days_to_close] = 1,   1,
      FactLinear[days_to_close] <= 7,  2,

      6
  )
